title: Adopt the certified exec-scorer into the training loop + startup certification
workstream: R1 (trustworthy eval harness — the global gate)
closes: the R1.3 finding — current training-loop scorer was untrustworthy (issues-backlog HIGH, now DONE)
files_touched: scripts/ai/aq-local-training-loop (_score_response -> certified exec_scorer + abstention; _certify_scorer() startup gate; abstained excluded from pass_rate; scorer_certified on run result)
live_path_wired: run_once now certifies the loop's scorer against data/golden/ via eval_integrity.trustworthiness_gate BEFORE eval (phase 1c); records scorer_certified + reason on the run result and progress sidecar; _score_response delegates to the certified exec_scorer (exec-based + infra-abstention); abstained cases are excluded from the pass/fail denominator so contention can't fake a regression.

test_evidence.unit: test-loop-scorer-certified.py 4/4 — loop scorer now CERTIFIED trustworthy, abstains on infra-noise (score=None not false-0), ranks good>bad across scoring types, backward-compatible with legacy keyword eval cases
test_evidence.closure: before R1.2 the loop scorer FAILED the gate (discrimination + noise-grading); after R1.2 it PASSES — _certify_scorer() returns trustworthy=True live

activation_gate.on: runs every loop cycle; scorer certification recorded on each run
activation_gate.observable: scorer_certified + scorer_cert_reason on training-loop-results + progress sidecar (dashboard-visible); print at loop start
activation_gate.intervenable: golden set + thresholds under data/golden + eval_integrity; fail-safe uncertified on any error (never silently trusts)

rollback: revert _score_response to the keyword+length heuristic and remove the _certify_scorer call; eval_integrity + golden set remain (harmless).
no_autonomy_note: scorer_certified=False is recorded but does not yet HARD-BLOCK ingest/train — the enforcement (refuse to ingest/train on uncertified scores) is the immediate R1 follow-up so the signal gate becomes a hard gate, not just a flag.
deferred: hard-block ingest/train when scorer_certified=False; shadow/canary datasets; expand golden CORPUS (R1.1, antigravity/codex).
